steps.title: Read the exponential form
steps.content: In an exponential model $a(b)^x$, the coefficient $a$ is the value when $x=0$. Here $x$ is the number of years after $2015$.

steps.title: Evaluate the starting year
steps.content:
The year $2015$ corresponds to $x=0$.
$$f(0)=4{,}800(0.80)^0$$
$$f(0)=4{,}800$$
So $4{,}800$ is the estimated initial moth population in $2015$. The answer is A.
